hero.title: Hairspray
hero.reason: In honor of National Chocolate Ice Cream Day, we're celebrating with a movie that features a dancing queen who loves chocolate and a story that's as sweet as a cold ice cream on a summer day. The musical numbers and upbeat tone make it a perfect fit for this fun observance.
hero.blurb: Hairspray is a musical extravaganza with stunning performances and catchy songs. The film's energetic and colorful vibe makes it a delightful watch, especially on a day when we're indulging in sweet treats like chocolate ice cream.

released.title: Fantastic Four: Rise of the Silver Surfer
released.reason: Released today in 2007, this superhero sequel brought a fresh wave of excitement to the Fantastic Four franchise with its epic action sequences and stunning visual effects.
released.blurb: The film's visual effects hold up remarkably well even years later, and the cast's chemistry makes the superhero team's dynamics a joy to watch. While it may not be the most faithful comic book adaptation, it's an enjoyable ride with plenty of action and humor.

birthday.title: Killer Klowns from Outer Space
birthday.reason: Happy birthday to Charles Chiodo, one of the special effects masters behind this cult classic, which showcases his creative and often terrifying creature designs.
birthday.blurb: This campy horror-comedy has become a staple of 80s nostalgia, with its bizarre alien clowns and over-the-top practical effects. It's a wild ride that's equal parts frightening and hilarious, making it a must-watch for fans of quirky cult classics.

awful.title: I Know Who Killed Me
awful.reason: This psychological thriller is infamous for its convoluted plot, cheesy dialogue, and Lindsay Lohan's notorious performance, making it a trainwreck that's so bad it's become entertaining.
awful.blurb: The film's attempts at being a dark and edgy thriller fall flat, with cringe-worthy moments that will leave you laughing at its absurdity. It's a fascinating example of how a movie can be both terrible and mesmerizing at the same time, like a car crash you can't look away from.
